hostc
DocsGitHub

Edge Tunnels · Cloudflare Workers

Localhost to the edge.

Instantly expose your local HTTP and WebSocket services to the public internet. Zero config. No signup.

Get startedStar on GitHub
❯npx hostc@latest 3000
SuccessTunnel ready
Public URL:https://t-a1b2c3d4.hostc.dev
Local:http://localhost:3000/
Tunnel:t-a1b2c3d4
Channels:2

Agent-ready public preview

Give your agent a tunnel tool.

Install the hostc skill so Codex and other agents know how to expose a local dev server, share a public preview URL, and stop the tunnel when the preview is no longer needed.

Install skill
npx skills add akazwz/hostc
Then ask your agent: Expose localhost:3000 as a public preview.

Zero Config

Run one command, get a public HTTPS URL instantly. No account, no setup.

WebSocket Support

Seamlessly proxies WebSocket upgrades out of the box. ws:// → wss://.

Edge Powered

Traffic routes through Cloudflare's global network for low-latency worldwide.
